---
id: get-usage-logs
title: "Get paginated API usage logs"
description: "Retrieve detailed, paginated API usage logs showing every request made by a client. Each log entry includes the endpoint called, response status, response time, and timestamp. Use this for debugging, auditing, and detailed usage analysis."
sidebar_label: "Get paginated API usage logs"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get paginated API usage logs"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/usage/logs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve detailed, paginated API usage logs showing every request made by a client. Each log entry includes the endpoint called, response status, response time, and timestamp. Use this for debugging, auditing, and detailed usage analysis.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
